demoBanner.label: Demo Mode
demoBanner.message: All data resets daily at 4:00 AM UTC. Explore freely!

delegationBanner.error2fa: That account requires two-factor authentication. Set up 2FA in Settings before switching.

backendDownBanner.connectionBlockedDetail: Security headers are blocking requests over plain HTTP.
backendDownBanner.connectionLostDetail: Unable to reach the server. Retrying automatically...
backendDownBanner.httpsHint: Set DISABLE_HTTPS_HEADERS=true in your environment or access the site over HTTPS.

httpWarningBanner.label: HTTPS Required
httpWarningBanner.detail: Security headers are active but this site is being accessed over plain HTTP. API requests may fail.
httpWarningBanner.httpsHint: Set DISABLE_HTTPS_HEADERS=true in your environment or access the site over HTTPS.

updateBanner.availableGeneric: A new version of Monize is available

pageHeader.helpAriaLabel: Open the Monize wiki for help with this section
